label: v3_best + wood_flat_bonus=0.5 (exploit baseline)
note: Hand-edited from v3_best.json by setting wood_flat_bonus=0.5. Used as a fixed adversarial baseline in tuning runs — represents an agent that over-values raw wood by +0.5 per unit (outside the stage weighting). Empirically beats unmodified v3_best by ~8-13 points in head-to-head (post-fields_crops promotion), so resources tuning that includes this in fitness should learn to resist it.
